title: Old Netherite Crafts
description: Returns easy crafting of netherite items!
body:
**Returns easy crafting of netherite items!**
## Returns:
- **Netherite Sword**
- **Netherite Pickaxe**
- **Netherite Axe**
- **Netherite Shovel**
- **Netherite Hoe**
- **Netherite Helmet**
- **Netherite Chestplate**
- **Netherite Leggings**
- **Netherite Boots**

## Example:
### 1.20.6+
*A stone will be needed for crafting*

![1.20.6+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3983549c399c3551aa82253f0599bccf7c62247b.png)
![1.20.6+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/236e8bb558a9b5d600b31cf0ebb650685b8553d2.png)
### 1.20-1.20.4
*No stone required for crafting*

![1.20-1.20.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/518929f9c1fb5441bd3eb20477bd269063578748.png)

![1.20-1.20.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb8b20a74fd989a571052bd6099857efa11117ad.png)
